arts.ttl: 'I blame one person for Liverpool disaster – I much preferred playing for Tottenham'
arts.sum: Robbie Keane's six-month stint at Liverpool wasn't as successful as many hoped it would be – and he even admitted he preferred playing for Tottenham Hotspur out of all the clubs he represented

arts.ttl: Tottenham v Liverpool: Best bets for all Sunday’s Premier League games
arts.sum: Our betting expert with tips for a forecast thriller at Spurs, Manchester United against Bournemouth, Everton-Chelsea and Fulham v Southampton PLUS a La Liga angle

arts.ttl: 'Can tell the owners' - Arne Slot sends FSG Liverpool spending message ahead of January transfer window
arts.sum: Arne Slot has joked about Liverpool's transfer spending in comparison to Chelsea ahead of the January transfer window

arts.ttl: Liverpool injuries: Every player missing for Tottenham clash
arts.sum: Every Liverpool player unavailable for their clash with Tottenham in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Luis Díaz returns to Spurs hoping for luck to change and drought to end
arts.sum: Colombian famously denied a goal at Tottenham in 2023 by the officials as league leaders look to strengthen position Luis Díaz rarely needs a reminder that relying on others can be a futile experience but a return to Tottenham on Sunday offers the opportunity to right a glaring injustice. In north London in September last year, the winger thought he had given Liverpool the lead, only for the assistant to flag incorrectly for offside before the video assistant referee failed to overturn the mistake through incompetent communication in a match Liverpool went on to lose 2-1. The officials made the headlines that day but Díaz has taken plenty of the limelight since. With a competitive cohort, Arne Slot has shown faith in Díaz, starting the Colombian in key fixtures with Manchester City, Arsenal, Manchester United and Aston Villa to help Liverpool reach the top of the table and ensure they fear no one. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Tottenham star Dejan Kulusevski sends Liverpool warning as Man City remark repeated
arts.sum: TOTTENHAM vs LIVERPOOL: Dejan Kulusevski is striving to continue his blistering form against Arne Slot's Reds this weekend as Ange Postecoglou's side bid to make it three wins on the spin in all competitions

arts.ttl: Arne Slot points finger at Chelsea's transfer spending as Liverpool title battle heats up

arts.ttl: Arne Slot details final step Liverpool must make to take hold of Premier League title race

arts.ttl: Liverpool told they have one advantage over Arsenal in Premier League title race
arts.sum: Liverpool and Arsenal are locked in a Premier League title race this season and one pundit believes the Reds have an edge over their rivals
